name: Dendrite Systems
description: Stockholm-based browser agent platform for autonomous web automation with natural-language element targeting.

seo.meta_description: Dendrite Systems: Stockholm-based browser agent platform for autonomous web automation with natural-language element targeting.

when_to_use: Giving AI agents reliable browser control for web task automation
Building agents that navigate and extract data from any website
Automating QA testing workflows via AI browser interactions
Running web research agents that browse, click, and fill forms

cons: Still early — reliability on complex sites varies
review.verdict: Promising EU alternative to Browserbase and Browser Use; not yet battle-tested at scale.
review.best_for: EU teams building web-automation agents with data-residency needs
review.not_for: High-reliability production workflows where deterministic scraping is safer
